title: berberis × neubertii
intro: Berberis × neubertii, also known as the Red Barberry, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Berberis vulgaris and Berberis aquifolium. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Berberis × neubertii include supporting liver and kidney function, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic to protect against infections. Berberis × neubertii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and its extract is also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
